name: personalingo
description: Personalized IELTS speaking corpus generator. Install-only (zero backend) by default: questionnaire -> guided conversation -> 7-step distillation -> profile -> static site. Upgradable to runnable-export mode (full project) for topic-bank sync and QMD RAG.
author: orzcls

endpoints.description: Generate diagnostic questionnaire from free-form text

pipeline.name: three_stage_distill

stages.name: research
stages.description: Aggregate questionnaire + dialogue into learner_profile (background, goal_vector, weakness_signals, language_samples, topic_signals, source_stats)

stages.name: framework
stages.description: Ability x Scenario x Goal matrix + pain_points + lift_paths

stages.name: persona
stages.description: MBTI four-dimension analysis + communication style (injects band_strategy)

stages.name: anchors
stages.description: 3-4 personal core stories with keywords and connectable_topics

stages.name: bridges
stages.description: 15-28 topic bridges with sample_answer + safe_stop_point + techniques_used

stages.name: vocabulary
stages.description: 25-30 band-tiered vocabulary items with basic_word/upgrade pairs

pipeline.band_strategy_injection: Stages 3-7 MUST inject the target_band block from skill-assets/band-strategies.json into each LLM system prompt.
pipeline.fallback: Any stage failure is recorded in skill_manifest.stages[i] as {status:'fallback', source:'rule_fallback|asset_fallback|user_input', note:'...'} and pipeline continues. Required fields must remain non-empty via fallback assets.

requirements.agent: Any skill-compatible AI agent (Claude / Qoder / Cursor / Cline / ...)
requirements.local_fs: Write access to current working directory
requirements.llm: Agent's built-in LLM is sufficient; no external API key required for install-only mode
